---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new model, provider, or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I can't route tasks to X provider because..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## For new model/provider requests, please provide

- Provider name:
- Model ID(s):
- Input cost per 1M tokens:
- Output cost per 1M tokens:
- Context window:
- API documentation URL:
- Notable capabilities (vision, embeddings, reasoning, etc.):

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context or screenshots about the feature request.
